MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
Tom Purtell for Plaintiff.
Marilyn Raia for Defendant.

THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO THE MATTER BEING DECIDED BY THE JUDGE PRO TEM. THE PARTIES AND THE JUDGE PRO TEM APPEARING REMOTELY AUTHORIZE THE CLERK TO SIGN THE FORMAL STIPULATION FORM ON THEIR BEHALF.

The Court noted late compliance of tentative ruling rule and allows oral argument.

ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT MICHAEL KROUSE Amended Notice Of Motion To Compel Response And Production And Monetary Sanctions is under submission.
